description: Black backpack with grey accents, has stitched, embroidered details, overlays, a flap with an elasticated mouth, secured by dual click clasps, has a concealed zip pocket and branding on the flapA haul loop on the back, two ergonomically designed adjustable and padded sternum shoulder straps with mesh inner, shoulder lift adjuster with ladder lock buckle, has branding on one strapOne main compartment, secured by a toggle clasp and tabs with a click clasp, has an inner mesh zip pouchA stitched tab, a tool carry loop with toggle clasp on the front for extra storage, has a loop near the baseA mesh stash pocket with an elasticated mouth and tabs to adjust the size on either sidePadded and mesh back for support and comfort, has air passage channelsEco friendly, PVC free and recyclableWarranty: 5 years against manufacturing defects
